name: kaseya-bms-mcp
description: MCP server for Kaseya BMS PSA - manage tickets, accounts, contacts, time entries, contracts, and KB through AI assistants
long_description: Provides AI assistants with structured access to your Kaseya BMS PSA tenant. List and create tickets, append notes, list time entries, browse accounts, contacts, contracts, the service catalog, and search the knowledge base via the Model Context Protocol.

kaseya_bms_api_token.title: Kaseya BMS API Token
kaseya_bms_api_token.description: BMS API token (omit if using Kaseya One token)

kaseya_bms_k1_token.title: Kaseya One SSO Token
kaseya_bms_k1_token.description: Kaseya One SSO token (alternative to API token)
